'''nafudu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbobbing|headbobbing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-f-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbobbing|headbobbing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| nafudu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:næfidith|næfidith]] || [[word:næfidij|næfidij]] || [[word:næfidish|næfidish]] || [[word:næfidi|næfidi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:nafufuduth|nafufuduth]] || [[word:nafufuduj|nafufuduj]] || [[word:nafufudush|nafufudush]] || [[word:nafufudu|nafufudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:nafuduth|nafuduth]] || [[word:nafuduj|nafuduj]] || [[word:nafudush|nafudush]] || [[word:nafudu|nafudu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:nafufdufth|nafufdufth]] || [[word:nafufdufj|nafufdufj]] || [[word:nafufdufsh|nafufdufsh]] || [[word:nafufduf|nafufduf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nafuduthu|nafuduthu]] || [[word:nafuduju|nafuduju]] || [[word:nafudushu|nafudushu]] || [[word:nafuduku|nafuduku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nafuduth|nafuduth]] || [[word:nafuduj|nafuduj]] || [[word:nafudush|nafudush]] || [[word:nafudu|nafudu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nafuduthul|nafuduthul]] || [[word:nafudujul|nafudujul]] || [[word:nafudushul|nafudushul]] || [[word:nafudukul|nafudukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nafuduuthuthu|nafuduuthuthu]] || [[word:nafuduujuju|nafuduujuju]] || [[word:nafuduushushu|nafuduushushu]] || [[word:nafuduuku|nafuduuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nafuduthun|nafuduthun]] || [[word:nafudujun|nafudujun]] || [[word:nafudushun|nafudushun]] || [[word:nafudukun|nafudukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nafuduthuoro|nafuduthuoro]] || [[word:nafudujuoro|nafudujuoro]] || [[word:nafudushuoro|nafudushuoro]] || [[word:nafudukuoro|nafudukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|8a892ea}}
